zh.lifeSummary: 當John Grey於1300年10月9日出生在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯時，他的父親Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield23歲，母親Margaret Oddingseles23歲。他於1317年12月27日之前與Katharine FitzAlan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1359年9月1日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Grey于1300年10月9日出生在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯时，他的父亲Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield23岁，母亲Margaret Oddingseles23岁。他于1317年12月27日之前与Katharine FitzAlan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1359年9月1日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Grey was born on 9 October 1300, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Oddingseles, was 23. He married Katharine FitzAlan before 27 December 1317. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 1 September 1359, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Grey est né le 9 octobre 1300, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Oddingseles, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Katharine FitzAlan avant 27 décembre 1317. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 1 septembre 1359, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Grey am 9. Oktober 1300 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Oddingseles 23. Er hat vor 27. Dezember 1317 Katharine FitzAlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 1. September 1359 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Grey è nato il il 9 ottobre 1300 nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Oddingseles, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Katharine FitzAlan prima del 27 dicembre 1317. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 1 settembre 1359, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Greyが1300年10月9日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで生まれた時，父Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfieldは23歳，母Margaret Oddingselesは23歳であった。1317年12月27日以前にKatharine FitzAlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1359年9月1日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Grey(이)가 1300년 10월 9일 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Oddingseles(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1317년 12월 27일 이전 Katharine FitzAlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1359년 9월 1일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에 묻혔다.

pt.9 October 1300–1 September 1359: 9 de outubro de 1300–1 de setembro de 1359
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Grey nasceu em 9 de outubro de 1300, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Oddingseles, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Katharine FitzAlan antes 27 de dezembro de 1317. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1 de setembro de 1359, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Grey родился 9 октября 1300 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Oddingseles, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Katharine FitzAlan перед 27 декабрь 1317 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 1 сентября 1359 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.9 October 1300–1 September 1359: 9 de octubre de 1300–1 de septiembre de 1359
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Grey nació el 9 de octubre de 1300, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Oddingseles, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Katharine FitzAlan antes de 27 de diciembre de 1317. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 1 de septiembre de 1359, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
